_meta.method: plugin-id universe from the Resolve binary (exact); param/enum CANDIDATES from factory-block string scan (heuristic — candidateQuality low means a noisy window); paramsObserved = EXACT param names decoded from real project grades (ground truth). Decode does NOT need this registry (OFX params are self-describing on the wire); it exists to assist AUTHORING and enum lookup.
_meta.note: commonHostParams apply to most ResolveFX nodes at the host level (their strings are linker-deduped away from per-plugin blocks). paramsObserved values are EXACT. The write path currently uses Film Grain's toolId constant for all plugins — whether Resolve keys on toolId or the pluginId string is the one remaining live question.
